name: Passky Client
description: Simple, modern, lightweight, open source and secure password manager
compose:
name: slashnode-passky-client
services:
  web:
    image: rabbitcompany/passky-client:8.1.1
    container_name: passky-client
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5052:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
